chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of Embracing the Pilgrim

text: 2513 - فِي رِوَايَةِ أَبِي اَلْحُسَيْنِ اَلْأَسَدِيِّ رَضِيَ اَللَّهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «مَنْ عَانَقَ حَاجّاً بِغُبَارِهِ كَانَ كَأَنَّمَا اِسْتَلَمَ اَلْحَجَرَ اَلْأَسْوَدَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2513 - In a narration by Abu al-Husayn al-Asadi, may Allah (swt) be pleased with him, Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever embraces a pilgrim while the dust of the journey is still on them, it is as if they have touched the Black Stone."
